data.name: MSYNC001_MessageFormat
data.value: Property '{0}' is missing a column type attribute (e.g. MySqlColumnTypeAttribute, SqlServerColumnTypeAttribute)

data.name: MSYNC001_Description
data.value: All public properties on a model class decorated with a table name attribute must have a column type attribute so ModelSync can generate correct SQL.

data.name: MSYNC002_MessageFormat
data.value: Class '{0}' has column type attributes but is missing a table name attribute (e.g. MySqlTableNameAttribute)

data.name: MSYNC002_Description
data.value: Classes whose properties carry column type attributes should also have a table name attribute so ModelSync can generate correct SQL.

data.name: MSYNC003_MessageFormat
data.value: Model class '{0}' has no property decorated with a primary key attribute

data.name: MSYNC003_Description
data.value: Every database table model should designate at least one property as a primary key.

data.name: Attr_InvalidLength
data.value: Invalid length for {0}. Must be a number <= 65535 or 'MAX'.
